name: Lepton universality in b -> s l+ l- transitions: R(K), R(K*)
requirement: Any candidate framework must reproduce the LHCb 2022 measurements of R(K) = Br(B+ -> K+ mu+ mu-)/Br(B+ -> K+ e+ e-) and R(K*) = Br(B0 -> K*0 mu+ mu-)/Br(B0 -> K*0 e+ e-), now consistent with SM prediction (~1.0) after the long-standing 3.1 sigma anomaly was reanalyzed with improved electron-channel reconstruction.

regime.description: B-meson decays via the b -> s l+ l- electroweak penguin / box; sensitive to TeV-scale BSM contributions to the Wilson coefficients C_9, C_10.

current_bound.reference: LHCb Collaboration, 'Measurement of lepton universality parameters in B+ -> K+ l+ l- and B0 -> K*0 l+ l- decays', PRD 108, 032002 (2023), arXiv:2212.09153

what_it_excludes: Earlier hints of LFU violation in R(K), R(K*) at ~3 sigma motivated whole classes of BSM (Z' models, leptoquarks, scalar mediators) tuned to give muon-electron asymmetry. The 2022 LHCb update brought R(K), R(K*) back to SM consistency. Surviving anomalies are now in angular observables (P_5') and in Br(B_s -> phi mu mu), where SM agreement remains contested due to hadronic uncertainties.

parameterization.name: Weak effective theory (WET) at the b-quark scale: Wilson coefficients C_9^(l), C_10^(l), and (right-handed) C_9'^(l), C_10'^(l) for each lepton flavor.
parameterization.reference: Buchalla, Buras, Lautenbacher, RMP 68, 1125 (1996); Altmannshofer, Stangl, EPJC 81, 952 (2021), arXiv:2103.13370 (post-2021 fit).
parameterization.summary: R(K), R(K*) are sensitive to the difference C_9^mu - C_9^e and C_10^mu - C_10^e. Hadronic form factors largely cancel in the ratio.

procedural.predicted_observable: R(K, K*) = integral |amplitude|^2 over q^2 bin, ratio of muon to electron channels. SM predicts 1 to ~1% precision below threshold corrections.
procedural.bound_in_parameterization: |C_9^mu - C_9^mu^SM|, |C_10^mu - C_10^mu^SM| consistent with 0 within ~10% at this point.
framework_inputs: Match framework onto WET; compute Wilson coefficients C_9, C_10 for muon and electron channels separately.
Standard tools: flavio, EOS, Wilson coefficient global fitter (smelli).

primary_references.citation: LHCb Collaboration, 'Measurement of lepton universality parameters in B+ -> K+ l+ l- and B0 -> K*0 l+ l- decays', PRD 108, 032002 (2023)
Altmannshofer and Stangl, 'New physics in rare B decays after Moriond 2021', EPJC 81, 952 (2021)
